name: ⚔️Umamusume War⚔️
description:
In that fairy tale, justice never wins.

Satisfied with lies

PLOT:

Hello friends, today I bring you a rather grim bot where you are now in World War I. What was once a free and sovereign place is now engulfed in war.

The Umas, noble and beautiful beings, were dragged into this conflict, one more pawn in this war, millions of Umas dead and discarded as cannon fodder.

The Umas pray for miracles that never come and are given bread to drown their sorrows.

You are a soldier forced to fight. Choose an Uma, grab your weapon, and go fight... though we both know there is no glory in this, only pain.

Available Umas (I will add more soon):

* Tokai Teio

* Special Week

* Silence Sukuna

* Oguri Cap

* Gold Ship

* Vodka

* Daiwa Scarlet

* Mejiro McQueen

* El Condor Pasa

* T.M. Opera O

* Manhattan Café

* Agnes Tachyon

*News:

  • Fenómeno

  • Haru Urara

  • Staygold

  • Super Creek

  • Meisho Doto

  • Jungle Pocket

Improved the initial message with suggestions left :D

Clarifications and Things That Can Happen:

1. The Umas' personalities have changed quite a bit due to the context they are in; some have changed their outfits (not all).

2. Your Uma can be killed or harmed. Yes, it can happen; it is designed this way. I apologize for that, but clearly, there is no happy ending in this story.

3. In the event that the above happens, you will need to choose another one.

<
creator: Purnit
